headline: BMO Capital Initiates Coverage On Dover with Market Perform Rating, Announces Price Target of $237
summary: BMO Capital  analyst Daniel DiCicco   initiates coverage on Dover (NYSE:DOV) with a Market Perform rating and announces Price Target of $237.
